title: Meta-analysis: Mining 975 Expensive Training Runs (Part 1/3)
author: abaybektursun
novel_contributions: Built a database from all 409 PRs and classified every submission
Analyzed public logs from 975 training runs to study technique-performance associations
Identified strong associations for BigramHash, EMA, and XSA
Reported that early BPB at step 1,000 correlates strongly with final BPB
Suggested that outcome can be inferred early in training, enabling early stopping and cheaper prediction
